ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "full_country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "alpha2_code" TEXT /* Alpha-2 code of the country (e.g., AF for Afghanistan) */,
  "alpha3_code" TEXT /* Alpha-3 code of the country (e.g., AFG for Afghanistan) */,
  "numeric_code" INTEGER /* Numeric code of the country (e.g., 4 for Afghanistan) */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Shorter, commonly used name for the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "calling_code" TEXT /* International calling code for the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Primary time zone of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the country's flag */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the country is currently active in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subdivisions" (
  "subdivision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subdivision */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the subdivision belongs to */,
  "subdivision_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-2 subdivision code */,
  "subdivision_name" TEXT /* Name of the subdivision */,
  "subdivision_type" TEXT /* Type of subdivision (e.g., state, province, region) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the subdivision's capital or central point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the subdivision's capital or central point */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the subdivision */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the subdivision in square kilometers */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the subdivision is currently active in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subdivision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subdivisions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geopolitical_data" (
  "geopolitical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geopolitical entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the geopolitical data belongs to */,
  "independent" INTEGER /* Whether the country is independent */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., republic, monarchy) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "head_of_state" TEXT /* Name of the head of state */,
  "head_of政府" TEXT /* Name of the head of government */,
  "last_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the last election */,
  "next_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the next election */,
  "political_stability_index" REAL /* Numerical index indicating political stability */,
  "human_development_index" REAL /* Numerical index indicating human development */,
  "corruption_perception_index" REAL /* Numerical index indicating corruption perception */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geopolitical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geopolitical_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the economic data belongs to */,
  "gdp_nominal" REAL /* Nominal GDP of the country */,
  "gdp_ppp" REAL /* GDP (PPP) of the country */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate */,
  "external_debt" REAL /* External debt of the country */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for which the economic data is recorded */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cultural_demographics" (
  "cultural_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cultural entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the cultural data belongs to */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the country */,
  "religion" TEXT /* Primary religion practiced in the country */,
  "ethnic_groups" TEXT /* Ethnic groups present in the country */,
  "official_languages" TEXT /* List of official languages */,
  "official_religions" TEXT /* List of official religions */,
  "major_ethnic_groups" TEXT /* List of major ethnic groups */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Migration rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cultural_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cultural_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the country information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the country information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond to the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_country_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the historical data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the historical data was recorded */,
  "full_country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country at the time */,
  "alpha2_code" TEXT /* Alpha-2 code of the country at the time */,
  "alpha3_code" TEXT /* Alpha-3 code of the country at the time */,
  "numeric_code" INTEGER /* Numeric code of the country at the time */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Shorter, commonly used name for the country at the time */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country at the time */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country at the time */,
  "calling_code" TEXT /* International calling code for the country at the time */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Primary time zone of the country at the time */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the country's flag at the time */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers at the time */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the country was active at the time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_country_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geopolitical_data_history" (
  "geopolitical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical geopolitical entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the historical geopolitical data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the historical geopolitical data was recorded */,
  "independent" INTEGER /* Whether the country was independent at the time */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government at the time */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country at the time */,
  "head_of_state" TEXT /* Name of the head of state at the time */,
  "head_of政府" TEXT /* Name of the head of government at the time */,
  "last_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the last election at the time */,
  "next_election_date" TEXT /* Date of the next election at the time */,
  "political_stability_index" REAL /* Numerical index indicating political stability at the time */,
  "human_development_index" REAL /* Numerical index indicating human development at the time */,
  "corruption_perception_index" REAL /* Numerical index indicating corruption perception at the time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geopolitical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geopolitical_data_history_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
